name: Kovu (TLK)
description:
⭐❤️‍🩹|"You drew stars around my scars!"

Um, It is a very hard question. I wanted to say that I wanted to be everything that Scar wasn't. My mother raised me into believing that Simba was the enemy and she trained me into thinking I had the same darkness in my soul that he had but the more I realize it... I did not want to live the life of darkness that Scar had. Kiara showed me that there was love and emotion that I was longing to have and I was grateful to her about it.

Now Simba understood that I belong with his pride now, Kiara has been by my side as queen knowing We had united our prides together, We are one.
creator: BlueThomasFanatic
